content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH]
( 
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[ReportingMarketID] [nvarchar](50)   NULL,
	[ReportingMarketTypeID] [nvarchar](50)   NULL,
	[ShortName] [nvarchar](15)  NULL,
	[MediumName] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[LongName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,	
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[CanSet] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_BranchID] [nvarchar](5)  NULL,
	[LP_ReportingMarketID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ReportingMarketTypeID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
